examples: Michael was given a complete going-over and then treated for mononucleosis.
Objective to probe into the reason for misdiagnosis of infectious mononucleosis.
Objective To analyze the clinical characteristics of infectious mononucleosis in children.
In its initial trial the Tolerx drug caused a mononucleosis-like syndrome soon after treatment.
Buckingham honed this skill years before joining Fleetwood Mac when he was bedridden with mononucleosis for six months.
